## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] content (new/edited comic or page)
- [ ] chore / ci / docs

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`type(scope): subject`)
- [ ] `pnpm check` and `pnpm typecheck` pass
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] New comics validate (correct `format`/`tags`/`character` from `src/config/comics.ts`)
